page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.6xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 24 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The instance provides 192.0 GB of system memory, establishing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per physical core.

This instance configuration does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by an 18 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The dedicated CPU allocation with one thread per core ensures consistent compute performance without resource sharing at the processor level. The high memory density relative to the core count makes this instance suitable for memory-intensive workloads such as database caching, in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and data analytics pipelines that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.6xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized instance featuring 24 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at 3.3 GHz. With a single thread per core and dedicated CPU allocation, it delivers stable compute performance alongside 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and provides an 18 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. It does not contain local storage or GPU hardware, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, including in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and data processing tasks that benefit from dedicated CPU resources and a high memory-to-core ratio without the need for local disk storage.
